ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "method" TEXT /* The machine learning method used for the model (e.g., GBM, GLM, KNN, NN, MM_GLM) */,
  "best_h" INTEGER /* The number of estimators (best_h) for the model */,
  "best_c" INTEGER /* The complexity of the model (best_c) */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* The mean absolute error of the model */,
  "percentage_of_absolute_error" REAL /* The percentage of absolute error of the model */,
  "adjusted_r_squared_error" REAL /* The adjusted R squared error of the model */,
  "second_error" REAL /* The second error metric of the model */,
  "mean_absolute_scaled_error" REAL /* The mean absolute scaled error of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the dataset used to train the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the data scientist who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "hyperparameters_version" TEXT /* Version of the hyperparameters */,
  "estimators" INTEGER /* The number of estimators for the model */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* The complexity of the model */,
  "other_parameters" TEXT /* Other hyperparameters for the model in JSON format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the data scientist who created the hyperparameters */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who modified the hyperparameters */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the data scientist who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
